name: Bond
description: Running-bond brickwork, the courses re-glazing brick by brick on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); width: 90%; height: 84%; margin: 8% 5%; border-radius: 6%; } @match(@y % 2 == 0) { margin-left: 26%; } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
